records.title: Goa Residential Campus

records.search_text: goa residential campus wpu gōa is designed as a fully residential university in india , where students do not simply attend classes and return to a hostel. they live, learn, collaborate, reflect, and grow within one connected campus about wpu goa live where learning never stops a fully residential learning experience learning that continues beyond the classroom. built for transdisciplinary learning where every discipline adds a new perspective. designed around wellbeing and sustainability a campus that supports you and the planet wpu gōa’s campus is also built around wellbeing and sustainability. the campus brings together residential spaces, dining spaces, sport and wellness areas, academic spaces, cultural zones, and community areas. the design provides a holistic student experience that integrates academic success with physical health, emotional well-being, social connection and personal development. the campus is also a showcase for an inspirational sustainability vision. focused on water positivity, energy positivity, zero waste and biodiversity enhancement, sustainability is experienced by students not as a concept to be learned at school, but as part of their everyday campus life. living learning scholar communities where shared spaces create stronger integrated thinkers. more than scale. a stronger student experience. a campus built for the future
